message:
feat(vfs): refactor Unix file locking to per-level reference counting

Replace the single lock_level field in InodeInfo with per-level reference
counts (n_shared, n_reserved, n_pending, n_exclusive) to correctly handle
multiple file handles within the same process holding different lock levels.

Key changes:
- Add posix_getlk() helper wrapping fcntl(F_GETLK) for lock probing
- Refactor InodeInfo from scalar lock_level to four reference-counted fields
- Extract unlock_locked() method on UnixFile that decrements the appropriate
  counter and only releases the underlying POSIX lock when the last holder
  at that level drops it
- This fixes the long-standing issue where closing one handle in a
  multi-handle process would prematurely release locks held by other handles,
  since POSIX advisory locks are per-process, not per-fd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
